This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Events, implicit button
  assert_array_equals: after showing lengths differ, expected array ["focusin on option1 at select", "focusin on option1 at wrapper"] length 2, got [] length 0
[FAIL] Events, explicit button
